programme.desc: Watermelon performs a body tap routine.

programme.title: E28 - Grape Kids' Super Camp
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids how to camp Supertato-style, but Evil Pea arrives and wows them with her ice camping. Before long, the Grape Kids need to be rescued by Supertato.

programme.title: E4 - Teddy
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'teddy' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E20 - Space Cucumber
programme.desc: Can there ever be such a thing as too much Messy? OKIDO is about to find out.

programme.title: E10 - Dot Pursuit
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E26 - The Beach
programme.desc: As Mum goes for a walk along the beach, Bluey runs to catch up with her. Along the way, she has a series of encounters that both excite and test her in her first solo adventure.

programme.title: E29 - Library
programme.desc: When Muffin is told that she is special by her dad, she interprets it as an excuse to do anything she wants, which means playing Bluey and Bingo's game of library her way.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E228 - Fun-Sized Friends / Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. It's a whole hunk of homunculus fun! // Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: E291 - Swimming Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip.

programme.title: E208 - No Such Luck / Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. // When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: E328 - Heart of Garbage / Near-Mint Plankton
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must search for Squidward after the inside of his home turns into a vast garbage jungle. // In his latest scheme, Plankton disguises himself as a collectible figurine and winds up trapped in Bubble Bass' basement.

programme.title: E327 - The Haunted Bucket
programme.desc: Spirits roam Bikini Bottom on Halloween after a ghost portal is opened in the Chum Bucket!

programme.title: E123 - The Starry Awards / Biorpsgiving
programme.desc: Patrick hosts an award ceremony. // Captain Doug Quasar meets Pat-Tron's robot family.

programme.title: E321 - Curse of the WereDoodle / Gorilla Suit Day
programme.desc: DoodleBob bites SpongeBob, transforming him into a 'WereDoodle'. // SpongeBob dresses up for Gorilla Suit Day and is mistaken for a real gorilla.

programme.title: E208 - No Such Luck / Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. // When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: E216 - Twin Henrys
programme.desc: Henry has Schwoz's shape-shifting android fill in for him at a family dinner so he can watch the MMA fight of the year with Charlotte and Ray.

programme.title: E208 - Bottle Snatchers
programme.desc: After Danger Force thwarts a robbery at Club Soda and has a legendary night celebrating their win, Ray challenges the kids to repeat their epic night out without their superhero uniforms and powers.

programme.title: E118 - The Patterfly Effect / A Space Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Patrick messes with the space-time continuum. // While Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.

programme.title: E208 - Love is in the Lair
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: E303 - Big Dynomite
programme.desc: Mika and Chapa are determinded to prove to Miles, Bose, and Ray that the new kid in school, Buddy Fudgers, is Lil' Dynomite, before he succesfully completes his plan to get his sworn revenge on his nemesis, Captain Man.

programme.title: E205 - Making the Grade
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake!

programme.title: E108 - For Your Spies Only
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: E535 - Game of Phones
programme.desc: When a young girl chains herself outside of Junk-N-Stuff, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to help find her beloved phone. While on a stakeout, they unexpectedly run across some familiar faces with a devious plan they weren't prepared for.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House / Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour. // Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E208 - Love is in the Lair
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: E123 - The Starry Awards / Biorpsgiving
programme.desc: Patrick hosts an award ceremony. // Captain Doug Quasar meets Pat-Tron's robot family.

programme.title: E208 - No Such Luck / Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. // When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Family Adventures
programme.desc: Join Nina & her familia for some sibling adventures! First, Lucy, Nina & Mateo visit a petting zoo to dance with baby animals. Then, the siblings dream of soaring through the sky like their pilot dad during a trip to the park! The family fun continues with a soccer game challenge, a bath time competition & a quest to help the magical Star Star get back to the sky. It's a month of family love & adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him & his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa & singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color & help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E1 - Olivier Paradis, Trekking Guide In Morocco
programme.desc: Olivier Paradis welcomes Canadian tourists for a hike through the Moroccan High Atlas. Unfavourable weather conditions force them to change route, testing their capacity for adaptation and their flexibility of both mind and body. During their journey they cross the path of a group of noble Amazigh.

programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

Unfavourable weather conditions force them to change route, testing their capacity for adaptation and their flexibility of both mind and body. During their journey they cross the path of a group of noble Amazigh.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E14 - Behind The Scenes At The Liege Opera!
programme.desc: From the costume workshop to the sets and the accessory stockroom, a tour of the Liege Opera where ''Traviata'' is performed. Also featuring director Jean-Marie Poire, landscape designer Alexandre Vandiest, Patrick Syen's Bentleys, and soprano Louise Foor.

programme.title: E1 - Olivier Paradis, Trekking Guide In Morocco

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E7 - Virton
programme.desc: We head off to Virton, the capital of the Gaume region, which shares the title of ''sunniest region in Belgium'' with the coast! On the programme: the Baillet-Latour museum; the Wind Horse farm; downhill quad biking; city trip to Besancon...

programme.title: E33 - Chevilly - Chamerolles
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chevilly castle reveals its elegant silhouette in the natural region of Beauce. Between the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, luxurious baths and captivating fragrances... At the Chamerolles castle, history blends with the scents of the 18th century.

programme.title: E9 - Jacky Chery/Phytoplankton/Parc De La Jailliere
programme.desc: Contents: Jacky Chery, repairer and collector of antique tools; phytoplankton; the Chateau de la Jailliere agricultural park; Don't panic: back with Pierre.

programme.title: E3 - Managing Risk
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas head to Sainte-Anne-des-Monts, where backcountry skiing must adapt to environmental challenges. They take care not to disturb the endangered Gaspesie woodland caribou.

programme.title: E8 - A Crazy Day In Puy-De-Dome
programme.desc: Loic Ballet explores the volcanic lands of Puy-de-Dome with Kevin Quicke, a member of the Wazoo group. They find original local products and visit unusual homes.

programme.title: E11 - The Cezallier, A Land Of Silence
programme.desc: In Auvergne, between the Sancy mountains and those of Cantal, lie the high plateaus of Cezallier: a world of solitude, silent, with mystical accents.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. My Left Eye Sees Ghosts
programme.desc: May marries Daniel during holiday and inherits all money after his death. One night she suffers a fatal car accident. Ken comes to save her life and strange things happen...

programme.title: Why, Why, Tell Me Why
programme.desc: The first thing on notices about Yau is his strong hatred for mahjong. He had good reasons: his mahjong-playing mother refused to leave the gaming table to attend to his father who had been robbed. The father died as the result, of course. Being young and fancy-free, Yau goes to the beach with two friends to see if romance should drop on him. It does, and like a ton of bricks because he sees and falls for the beautiful Fong. It so happen Fong is a devoted mahjong player, but she has a sister who hates mahjong, Yau goes all out. He is first snubbed but later comforted by Fong in a gymnasium where he helps her dodge arresting traffic policemen. Fong tries her best to cover her addiction to mahjong and awkward situations come on fast and furious...

programme.title: Sleazy Dizzy
programme.desc: Lung was an informer of Police in the triad society. But his identity was exposed and lost all memory after hurt. All of money that given by the Police was lost. The Police suspicious Lung had hidden the money. So he was wanted by the triad society and Police. Sing was a little thief, he knew Lung and made friend together. He knew everything about Lung then, and he wanted to help Lung to recover his memory aimed to take back the money. Fong was a manger in a big firm. He had stolen a large amount of money of his firm and was discovered by his colleague later. So he wanted to kill Wu but failed. Fong also wanted the money of Lung, as a result, he wanted to kill Lung also. Wu was saved by Lung and Sing. The Boss of Fong knew everything were exposed and ordered Koo to kill Lung, Sing and Wu. But Wu won't do that because of their friendship...

programme.title: Young and Dangerous 3
programme.desc: The Hung Hing Club has just made Chan Ho Nam the 'keeper' of Causeway Bay. But, Dong Ying Club, Crow and Tiger open a karaoke club opposite to Chan's sticking a foot into his territory. On the other hand, Dong Ying succeeds in having Chang assassinated in Holland and frames Chan for his death. It's another challenge to Chan!

programme.title: My Left Eye Sees Ghosts
programme.desc: May marries Daniel during holiday and inherits all money after his death. One night she suffers a fatal car accident. Ken comes to save her life and strange things happen...

programme.title: Why, Why, Tell Me Why
programme.desc: The first thing on notices about Yau is his strong hatred for mahjong. He had good reasons: his mahjong-playing mother refused to leave the gaming table to attend to his father who had been robbed. The father died as the result, of course. Being young and fancy-free, Yau goes to the beach with two friends to see if romance should drop on him. It does, and like a ton of bricks because he sees and falls for the beautiful Fong. It so happen Fong is a devoted mahjong player, but she has a sister who hates mahjong, Yau goes all out. Fong tries her best to cover her addiction to mahjong and awkward situations come on fast and furious...

programme.title: The Top Bet
programme.desc: Do Do is everything Anita is not. Do Do is the brash, uncouth kind of a fishwife, while Anita is the personification of elegance, intellect and perfect deportment. Do Do works at a fish store but hopes to be a clairvoyant but Anita has this extra-sensory perception power by birth. Uncle's enterprise is in danger as top gambler Sung issues a challenge. Uncle asks Anita to take on Sung but she refuses. In desperation, Uncle goes to Do Do who playfully claims to be the ESP queen of gamblers...

programme.title: Fight Back To School II
programme.desc: The story is about sing, who becomes a traffic cop, determines to be an undercover again at school to regain his reputation of being a leader of SDU.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

programme.title: When Night Falls In Vienna
programme.desc: Vienna is beautiful. Surrounded by elegant imperial facades, people enjoy culture and coffee. Or, they might clatter past St. Stephen's Cathedral and the Sisi Museum in horse-drawn carriages. But when night falls, the city shows itself in a whole new light.

programme.title: Why Valencia Should Be Your Next Spanish Escape
programme.desc: Join us in Valencia, Spain! DW's Sarah Hucal takes you through her favorite city. She dives into historic plazas, vibrant street art, lively markets and the stunning City of Arts and Sciences. Discover why this might be Spain's most underrated big city - and taste local favorites from creamy horchata to iconic paella.

programme.desc: It's slimy, green, and alive - and absorbs more CO2 than most trees. Are Kerala's new 'liquid trees' a gamechanger?

programme.title: Street Debate: Did Kaluma Boy Expose Kenya's Broken And Corrupt System?
programme.desc: In Kenya, corruption scandals and a failing health system leave families stranded. When hospitals and governments vanish, citizens turn to TikTok and civil society for help to build roads, equip schools or anything else. The story of Kaluma Boy caring for his sick father exposes a dysfunctional state and the power of online solidarity.

programme.title: Sarap 'di Ba?

programme.title: Reel Life Weekend 'Mindanao'
programme.desc: A Muslim mother struggles to care for her terminally ill daughter while waiting for her husband, a combat medic, to return from war. Through a mythical folk tale she tells her child, the film reflects love, sacrifice, and the realities of conflict in Mindanao.

programme.desc: A Muslim mother struggles to care for her terminally ill daughter while waiting for her husband, a combat medic, to return from war. Through a mythical folk tale she tells her child, the film reflects love, sacrifice, and the realities of conflict in Mindanao.

programme.title: E203 - Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: E406 - Breaking The Ice
programme.desc: When a little bunny gets trapped on top of a melting glacier, Blaze must put his new robot powers to the test as he races to the rescue.

programme.title: E1304 - Pups Save The One-Man Band
programme.desc: Francois causes musical mayhem, as a one-man band, when he plans a special song for Wally's birthday.

programme.title: E1304 - Pups Save A Hum-Kicker
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger turns up the power on his robotic soccer cleats, the 'Hum-Kickers', and starts wrecking the town.

programme.title: E201 - Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: E129 - Pancakes
programme.desc: Mummy Pig makes pancakes, and Peppa and George help, but Daddy Pig flips his pancake so high it sticks to the ceiling.

programme.title: E131 - Ballet Lesson
programme.desc: Peppa goes to her first ballet lesson, and meets her friends there. She decides to teach Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig to dance but finds out they have some moves of their own.

programme.title: E1304 - Pups Save The One-Man Band
programme.desc: Francois causes musical mayhem, as a one-man band, when he plans a special song for Wally's birthday.

programme.title: E1304 - Pups Save A Hum-Kicker
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger turns up the power on his robotic soccer cleats, the 'Hum-Kickers', and starts wrecking the town.

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E203 - Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: E1304 - Pups Save The One-Man Band
programme.desc: Francois causes musical mayhem, as a one-man band, when he plans a special song for Wally's birthday.

programme.title: E1304 - Pups Save A Hum-Kicker
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger turns up the power on his robotic soccer cleats, the 'Hum-Kickers', and starts wrecking the town.

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith.

programme.title: E109 - Toy
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy.

programme.title: E109 - Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: E201 - Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: E505 - Naughty Tortoise
programme.desc: Dr Hamster's pet tortoise Tiddles gets stuck up a tree - who is going to come to the rescue?

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E111 - Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E201 - Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E409 - Meatball Mayhem
programme.desc: When Crusher accidentally knocks a bottle of 'grow spice' onto a meatball, it grows to an enormous size and rolls away! It's up to Blaze and Pickle to transform into robots and stop the meatball before it wrecks the entire town!

programme.title: E208 - Adventures In Plantsitting / Andrea The Alebrije
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: E839 - The Electric Car
programme.desc: Daddy Pig arrives in a new electric car. The family all go for a ride and are surprised when the car talks and sings!

programme.title: E111 - Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Talking Europe guides you to the world of Europe's politics and cultures. Presented by Catherine Nicholson, the program revolves around top EU issues and events. Find out latest news from politicians and researchers joined by the guests of the program.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Telematin:2025-2026
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week! Resolutely in tune with the times, the first morning of France, strong of its editorial richness and its team dynamics, addresses many themes and deals with current events with seriousness and without dramatization.

programme.title: Telematin:2025-2026
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: E21 - Let's Play Cinema, Sequel
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: E30 - In Our Homes
programme.desc: As a nature enthusiast, Emilie is very interested in the behaviour of insects and other small creatures. What do ants eat? Why are frogs slimy? Can a tortoise catch a cold? No question goes unasked!

programme.title: E28 - Stamp Collection
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: E5 - The First Challenge
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: E9 - Is Ai Eco-Friendly?
programme.desc: Theo, a teenager, questions artificial intelligence directly to try to understand it better. He wants to know what it is made of, what feeds it, and how it analyzes data.

programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Pilou-saurus Rex
programme.desc: The Buffycats find a plastic dinosaur in the garden. Pilou wants to play with it, so they go to the park. But the dinosaur starts playing all sorts of pranks on them, and the inventor cat Edison tells them it's not just a simple toy...

programme.title: The Dam
programme.desc: Kit must shut down the hydroelectric plant to save Mr. Battery before he is chopped in the dam's turbine.

programme.title: The Bake Mistake
programme.desc: In a fierce cooking competition, Darwin and Newts learn about the importance of yeast in order to make things rise.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: The Star (Julia Roberts) and The Fighter (Wladimir Klitschko)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts relives her journey to becoming an Oscar winning actress and Wladimir Klitschko shares how he became an Olympic gold medallist and record breaking world heavyweight boxing champion.

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: Student Explorer
programme.desc: Philippe announces the first ever winner of the Xploration Awesome Planet Student Explorer Contest, and they travel together to Mexico to swim with whale sharks.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Sweet 16
programme.desc: The pressure is on for speed skater Izzy, who's been picked to train with the Olympic squad. How will she do when she is up against her skating idol Elise Christie? And there's a surprise in store for birthday girl Kloe.

programme.title: Trip to Mexico
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are invited to a costume party. Alim picks Princess for Milo, but Milo refuses, saying it's a girl's costume. Alim takes them to Mexico to meet Felina. At the muxhes' party, they learn about Zapotec culture, where muxhes are neither boys nor girls.

programme.title: Trip to Finland
programme.desc: While it's freezing outside, Zoe and Milo are warm inside. Alim arrives with a towel, ready for a bath in the icy puddle! Zoe and Milo are amazed! Alim takes them to Finland, where Aki shows them saunas and ice baths, proving Alim's point about the refreshing ice bath!

programme.title: Trip to Zimbabwe
programme.desc: While racing, Milo accidentally breaks his father's guitar and fears a scolding. Alim reassures him, saying not all parents scold. They go to Zimbabwe, where Bakala shows them that instead of scolding, her parents remind her of her achievements.

programme.title: The Bake Mistake
programme.desc: In a fierce cooking competition, Darwin and Newts learn about the importance of yeast in order to make things rise.

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Bubble Wrap
programme.desc: Doki shares Oto and Anabella's bubble-gum blowing pictures online. A friend of the Worldwide Expedition Club says it reminds him of the bubbles the worms make in New Zealand. Doki is amazed – why would a worm blow bubbles? The team set off to find out!

programme.title: Pencil
programme.desc: After scribbling away, let's explore some fun DIY ideas.

programme.title: Where's Ranger Loops?
programme.desc: There is a new ranger in the park. Mai, Oto, and Vik return from their holidays and realize Ranger Loops is nowhere to be found. Desperate to have their friend back, the kids are trying to find a way to bring Ranger Loops back.

programme.title: Dubious Spray Cans
programme.desc: Tempus has noticed a big cloud of dangerous, polluting gases over North Africa. These gases affect the ozone layer. Fulmen and Nix are on a mission to prevent an environmental disaster.

programme.title: Cat Cafe
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat cafe.

programme.title: Grounded
programme.desc: Naomi is confined to her room without communication devices, and relies on Carol to run messages back and forth to Claybook so she can keep up with what's going on in her complex social life. But chaos hits when the boy she likes chooses that exact day to get in touch.

programme.title: Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Robbie and Naomi are abducted by inquisitive aliens while in the park, and the other kids have to figure out a way to rescue them from the hovering spacecraft.

programme.title: Big Dress Up
programme.desc: Ranger Loops gives the kids a box of old costumes, and while they're dressing up, Vik learns that his true self is what's most important.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Fat-Busting Bile
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand investigate how your body digests fat and show you how to make bile art!

programme.title: Quest for Roman Numerals
programme.desc: C, D, I, V, and X are Roman numerals that still appear in the names of monarchs, the production year of films, and on buildings. In this episode we learn all there is about them. Can we still use Roman numerals to communicate?

programme.title: The Danish Elephant
programme.desc: This episode demonstrates how following a specific sequence of arithmetic steps, combined with the special properties of number 9, will always result in the same answer. Amaze your friends with your mind-reading super skills!

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.desc: Features stories culled from the reporters' own files, news that people did not see on the news programs. The show is written and hosted by the network's aggressive young reporters and hosted by the network.

programme.title: Never Say Die Marathon
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: Starring Ashida Mana and Okayama Amane, with a script by Okada Yoshikazu, this two‑night special drama follows a young woman whose longtime crush suddenly returns to their hometown. He chooses not to go back to Tokyo and instead works at his family's tofu shop, where she also has a part‑time job, and her days gradually fill with quiet joy. Feelings live not only in romance, but also in work, in dreams, and in life itself, and everything begins with those feelings. Set in Morioka, this is a gentle and heartfelt story about the beauty found in one‑sided love.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Since the first series began in 2015, “Inside Stories of Kyoto” has portrayed Kyoto's hidden elegance through both drama and documentary. After the second season reached a full-circle finale, the series finally returns in 2026. Set once again at Kurakuya Harunobu, a 240‑year‑old confectionery, the story picks up eight years after Sawafuji Miyako's departure for Paris. Now a new heroine, Mikami Miyako, arrives from France with a daunting mission. Confronted with Kyoto's intricate traditions and its proud, strong‑willed residents, she must find her own way forward.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Having taken control of the Kinai region, Nobunaga orders the Toyotomi brothers to pressure the merchants of Sakai, including Imai Soukyu (Wada Masato), into paying a levy of twenty thousand kan in arrow taxes, with Matsunaga Hisahide (Takenaka Naoto) acting as their intermediary. But the merchants prove formidable opponents. Meanwhile, the Miyoshi Triumvirate seize on Nobunaga's absence and launch an attack on Honkoku-ji Temple in Kyoto, where the newly appointed shogun Ashikaga Yoshiaki resides.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Humor Research Institute
programme.desc: Hong Kong comedies from the 1980's and 1990's had been widely popular and many of them are still considered as classics among the genre. In this episode, the “Humor Research Institute” has invited veteran filmmakers Chan Hing Kai, Ho Miu Ki and Jack Ng to talk about their comedy-creating experience and introduce how fascinating comedies are written.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Bodyguard, The follows a retired bodyguard (Hung) who has settled in the dark and unknown corner of the world where China, Russia and North Korea meet. Suffering from the beginnings of dementia, Bodyguard, The is befriended by a young girl whose life is threatened when her father (Lau) falls in with the local crime world. When the girl and her father disappear, Bodyguard, The must call upon his long forgotten skills to save the life of his young friend.

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Tony Leung Ka-fai: Cold War 2
programme.desc: The story of this highly-anticipated sequel continues as Acting Police Commissioner Sean Lau (Aaron Kwok) is promoted to the highest rank in the police force. Joe (Eddie Peng Yuyan), son of Deputy Police Commissioner Waise Lee (Tony Leung Ka Fai) who is behind the conspiracy, is taken into custody and Waise is forced to retire. But Master, Themind remains unknown, until the resurface of a former police chief who unveils an unprecedented scheme to corrupt the police force. Things get more complicated when senior counsel Oswald Kan (Chow Yun Fat) leads an impeachment proceeding against Sean. Oswald's every decision is pivotal in determining who stays on top of the game.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Romance Scam Syndicate
programme.desc: Sandra Ng and MC (Cheung Tin Fu) grow a virtual romance in the film “Love Lies” which the script has revolved around online dating scam. What inspired the production team to make such a tale of love and deceit? And how the main cast of two initially unlikable people was chosen? The film director Ho Miu Ki and producer Chan Hing Kai are invited hereby to tell us more about this romantic comedy...

programme.title: Love Lies
programme.desc: 'Love, once believed, is real.' Despite being swindled out of a large sum of money, the well-known gynecologist Yu still insisted that she was in love. Yu, who had been widowed for several years, met Joe, who was disguised as a middle-aged French petroleum engineer and widower, on a dating app, not knowing that he was part of an online scam group. Not only was Yu immersed in the online romance, but Joe also found pleasure and satisfaction in creating romantic experiences for Yu. Two initially unlikable people gradually changed through this online romance that began with deception.

programme.title: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A special agent must save the world from an enormous steam-powered tarantula.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E5 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: E6 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs.

programme.title: E6 - Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey talks to a 15-year-old aviation buff in England via Skype, who has discovered that Buffalo’s DC3–WZS–flew on D-Day. This inspires Mikey to do something special for the 70th anniversary. He invites Cory to do a tandem parachute jump and finds out that Cory’s grandfather was a paratrooper at the invasion of Normandy. Meanwhile, Mikey takes mercy on Prefkar, working the ramp in Hay River, and offers him a chance for some pilot training on the morning DC-3 freighter. But when the time comes, Prefkar learns that he’s been bumped for pilot David Alexandre. It gets worse for Prefkar when he’s given another chance and this time the fog rolls in. Prefkar might not stick it out at Buffalo. Mikey’s D-Day plans get even bigger when he contacts the Princess Patricia Canadian Light Infantry, who were part of the Allied airborne forces that dropped behind German lines in 1944. He pitches his plan—a reenactment jump from WZS, an actual D-Day plane. But there’s a hitch: the plane needs to pass in

E18
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Docu Insight
programme.desc: A premium documentary series from Korea's public broadcaster KBS

programme.title: E115
programme.desc: Marie's turbulent journey to find her father leads to the birth of an eccentric new family, one that proves stronger than blood and more persistent than DNA.

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: E115

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E348
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3 - The Waterways
programme.desc: Some of mightiest rivers in North America originate on the glacial heights of the Rocky Mountains. The lakes, rivers and marshes of the Rockies are like arteries pulsing through the landscape, feeding the creatures that call the mountains home. Fed by glaciers and motivated by gravity, these waterways are split by the massive Rockies, which divert flow into the Atlantic, Pacific, and Arctic Oceans. From the uninhabitable icy pecks, water melts off glaciers, runs down thunderous waterfalls, filters through wetlands, sculpts the terrain, and finally flows out to the ocean, sustaining life and transforming environments along the way.

programme.title: E5 - Group Survival
programme.desc: For a great many species, the structures of group living are the most important for survival. Although social living is integral to many of the animals that call the Rocky Mountains home, no two species organize their society in the same way. Even among closely related species there can be drastic differences in social structure; communication, hierarchy, mating, and diet are all inextricably informed by specific environmental and genetic adaptations for group survival.

programme.title: E5 - Rana: Queen of the Jungle
programme.desc: One of the most iconic animals on Earth stalks the jungles of India: the Bengal Tiger. Over the course of a single day, we follow the fortunes of one mother and her three young cubs. She must provide enough food for her family to stay alive.

programme.title: E6 - Youngsters of the Desert
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart; two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned, and a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.
